--- title: Advanced MDX Features Test subtitle: A comprehensive test of unusual MDX features tags: - test - mdx - advanced - features math: true comments: true --- # Advanced MDX Features Demonstration This document showcases **unusual** and *advanced* MDX features including ~~strikethrough~~, `inline code`, and superscript as well as subscript text. ## Text Formatting Features ### Emphasis and Strong Text - **Bold text** with `code` inside - *Italic text* with ~~strikethrough~~ mixed in - ***Bold italic*** combined formatting - `Code with **bold** and *italic* inside` ### Special Characters and Escaping - HTML entities: & \< > " ' - Unicode: 🚀 💻 ⚡ 🎯 - RTL text: مرحبا بالعالم - Math symbols: α β γ δ ε ## Advanced Lists ### Task Lists - \[x] Completed task with **bold** text - \[ ] Pending task with `code` - \[ ] Another task with ~~strikethrough~~ ### Definition Lists
**Bold Term**
Definition with *italic* and `code`
`CodeTerm`
Definition with ~~strikethrough~~ and superscript
### Nested Lists 1. First level - Second level with **bold** - Third level with `code` - Fourth level with ~~strikethrough~~ 2. Back to first level - Mixed formatting: **bold**, *italic*, `code`, ~~strikethrough~~ ## Advanced Tables | Feature | Description | Example | Status | |:--------|:-----------:|--------:|:------:| | **Bold** | *Italic* | `Code` | ✅ | | ~~Strikethrough~~ | Superscript | Subscript | ❌ | | Mixed: **bold** and *italic* | `Code with **bold**` | ~~Strike with `code`~~ | ⚠️ | ### Complex Table with Nested Content | Component | Props | Children | Notes | |-----------|-------|----------|-------| | `
` | CSS classes | Text content | Basic HTML | | `` | Inline styles | Any content | Inline elements | | `

` | Text content | None | Paragraphs | ## Code Blocks ### JavaScript with Syntax Highlighting ```javascript // Simple function with template literals const processData = (data, options = {}) => { const { transform = (x) => x, filter = () => true, sort = (a, b) => a - b } = options; return data .filter(filter) .map(transform) .sort(sort); }; // Usage with simple props const result = processData(users, { transform: (user) => ({ ...user, fullName: `${user.firstName} ${user.lastName}` }), filter: (user) => user.active, sort: (a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name) }); ``` ### TypeScript with Generics ```typescript interface ApiResponse { data: T; status: 'success' | 'error'; message?: string; } class ApiClient { constructor(private baseUrl: string) {} async fetch(endpoint: string): Promise> { const response = await fetch(`${this.baseUrl}${endpoint}`); return response.json(); } } // Usage const userClient = new ApiClient('/api/users'); const users = await userClient.fetch('/list'); ``` ### CSS with Custom Properties ```css :root { --primary-color: #007bff; --secondary-color: #6c757d; --success-color: #28a745; --danger-color: #dc3545; } .simple-component { --component-padding: 1rem; --component-border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: var(--component-padding); border-radius: var(--component-border-radius); background: linear-gradient( 135deg, var(--primary-color), var(--secondary-color) ); color: white; font-weight: bold; transition: all 0.3s ease; } .simple-component:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(0, 123, 255, 0.3); } ``` ## Math Expressions ### Inline Math The quadratic formula is: $x = \frac{-b \pm \sqrt{b^2 - 4ac}}{2a}$ ### Block Math $$ \int_{-\infty}^{\infty} e^{-x^2} dx = \sqrt{\pi} $$ ### Complex Math $$ \begin{align} \nabla \cdot \vec{E} &= \frac{\rho}{\epsilon_0} \\ \nabla \cdot \vec{B} &= 0 \\ \nabla \times \vec{E} &= -\frac{\partial \vec{B}}{\partial t} \\ \nabla \times \vec{B} &= \mu_0\vec{J} + \mu_0\epsilon_0\frac{\partial \vec{E}}{\partial t} \end{align} $$ ## Simple JSX Components ### Basic Component

**Simple Component** with *mixed formatting*

This component includes:

  • **Basic HTML** elements
  • *Mixed formatting* in content
  • `Code snippets` and ~~strikethrough~~
  • Superscript and subscript

## Blockquotes and Citations > This is a **blockquote** with *mixed formatting* and `code`. > > It can span multiple lines and include: > > - Lists > - **Bold text** > - *Italic text* > - `Code snippets` > - \~~Strikethrough text~~ > > Nested blockquotes are also supported > > > > With **complex** *formatting* and `code`

## Footnotes Here's a sentence with a footnote\[^1] and another one\[^2]. \[^1]: This is the first footnote with **bold** and *italic* text. \[^2]: This is the second footnote with `code` and ~~strikethrough~~. ## Comments {/* This is a JSX comment that should be handled properly */} {/* Multi-line JSX comment with **bold** and *italic* text and `code` snippets */} {/* Another comment with special characters: & < > " ' */} ## Advanced Links and References ### Complex Links - [Link with **bold** text](https://example.com) - [Link with `code` text](https://example.com/code) - [Link with ~~strikethrough~~](https://example.com/strike) ### Reference Links [Complex reference](https://example.com "Title with **bold** and *italic*") with **formatting**. ## Inline HTML

## Simple Expressions

**Dynamic content** examples:

  • Simple expression: {2 + 2} = 4
  • String template: {`Hello ${'World'}`}
  • Boolean: {true ? 'Yes' : 'No'}
## Spread Operators
